info.name: School Management API
info.description:
REST APIs for managing schools with proximity-based sorting.

## Base URL
`http://localhost:3000`

## Endpoints
- `POST /addSchool` — Add a new school
- `GET /listSchools` — Retrieve schools sorted by proximity

variable.description: Change this to your deployed API URL

request.description: Returns API metadata and available endpoints.
Lightweight liveness probe — use for uptime monitoring.
Adds a new school. All four fields are required.

response.name: 201 Created

request.description: Demonstrates validation failure response (empty name, invalid latitude).

response.name: 422 Unprocessable Entity

request.description: Sending the same school twice returns 409 Conflict.

response.name: 409 Conflict

request.description: Returns all schools sorted by haversine distance from the user's location. Closest schools appear first. Each school includes a `distance_km` field.

response.name: 200 OK – Schools Found
200 OK – No Schools
422 – Missing Parameters
